languages.text: {n}Иждриг отступает, тряся головой, пытаясь прийти в себя. Раны на его теле убили бы любого, но Батошски стоит вопреки всему, просто отказываясь останавливаться. И все же... Он поднимает руки.{/n}

{n}Izdrig steps back, shaking his head as he struggles to recover. The wounds on his body would have killed any other man, yet Batoshski stands in spite of it all, simply refusing to stop. And yet... He raises his hands.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Иждриг отступает, тряся головой, пытаясь прийти в себя. Раны на его теле убили бы любого, но Батошски стоит вопреки всему, просто отказываясь останавливаться. И все же... Он поднимает руки.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊兹德里格后退一步，摇着头，挣扎着稳住自己。换作别人，他身上的伤足以致命，但巴托什斯基却依然站立着，不肯倒下。然而……他还是举起了双手。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig steps back, shaking his head as he struggles to recover. The wounds on his body would have killed any other man, yet Batoshski stands in spite of it all, simply refusing to stop. And yet... He raises his hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊兹德里格后退一步，摇着头，挣扎着稳住自己。换作别人，他身上的伤足以致命，但巴托什斯基却依然站立着，不肯倒下。然而……他还是举起了双手。{/n}

languages.text: {n}İzdrig geri çekiliyor, toparlanmaya çalışırken başını sallıyor. Başkası olsa bu yaralar onu çoktan öldürürdü ama Batoshski; tüm bunlara rağmen ayakta duruyor, durmayı reddediyor. Fakat yine de... Ellerini kaldırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig steps back, shaking his head as he struggles to recover. The wounds on his body would have killed any other man, yet Batoshski stands in spite of it all, simply refusing to stop. And yet... He raises his hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İzdrig geri çekiliyor, toparlanmaya çalışırken başını sallıyor. Başkası olsa bu yaralar onu çoktan öldürürdü ama Batoshski; tüm bunlara rağmen ayakta duruyor, durmayı reddediyor. Fakat yine de... Ellerini kaldırıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Izdrig recule, ébranlé et sonné. Tout homme aussi grièvement blessé aurait succombé, mais Batoshski défie l'entendement et refuse de s'effondrer. Et pourtant... Il lève les mains en l'air.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig steps back, shaking his head as he struggles to recover. The wounds on his body would have killed any other man, yet Batoshski stands in spite of it all, simply refusing to stop. And yet... He raises his hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig recule, ébranlé et sonné. Tout homme aussi grièvement blessé aurait succombé, mais Batoshski défie l'entendement et refuse de s'effondrer. Et pourtant... Il lève les mains en l'air.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Izdrig retrocede un paso, sacudiendo la cabeza, mientras lucha por recuperarse. Las heridas de su cuerpo habrían matado a cualquier otro hombre, pero Batoshski sigue en pie a pesar de ellas, negándose en rotundo a detenerse. Y, sin embargo... alza las manos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig steps back, shaking his head as he struggles to recover. The wounds on his body would have killed any other man, yet Batoshski stands in spite of it all, simply refusing to stop. And yet... He raises his hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig retrocede un paso, sacudiendo la cabeza, mientras lucha por recuperarse. Las heridas de su cuerpo habrían matado a cualquier otro hombre, pero Batoshski sigue en pie a pesar de ellas, negándose en rotundo a detenerse. Y, sin embargo... alza las manos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Izdrig tritt zurück und schüttelt den Kopf. Seine Wunden hätten jeden anderen Mann längst getötet, aber Batoshski steht vor dir und weigert sich, aufzugeben. Und dennoch ... Er hebt seine Hände.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig steps back, shaking his head as he struggles to recover. The wounds on his body would have killed any other man, yet Batoshski stands in spite of it all, simply refusing to stop. And yet... He raises his hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig tritt zurück und schüttelt den Kopf. Seine Wunden hätten jeden anderen Mann längst getötet, aber Batoshski steht vor dir und weigert sich, aufzugeben. Und dennoch ... Er hebt seine Hände.{/n}

languages.text: {n}イズドリックは後退し、頭を振る。彼は傷を負いながらも立ち上がる。他の男なら死んでいた傷だが、バトシュスキーは立ち続け、立ち止まらない。しかし...彼は両手を上げる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig steps back, shaking his head as he struggles to recover. The wounds on his body would have killed any other man, yet Batoshski stands in spite of it all, simply refusing to stop. And yet... He raises his hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}イズドリックは後退し、頭を振る。彼は傷を負いながらも立ち上がる。他の男なら死んでいた傷だが、バトシュスキーは立ち続け、立ち止まらない。しかし...彼は両手を上げる。{/n}
